hooks.command: powershell -Command "$fp = (echo $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json).file_path; if ($fp -match '\.lua$' -and $fp -notmatch 'Libs[\\/]') { luacheck $fp --config .luacheckrc 2>$null; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit 0 } }"

powershell -Command "$fp = (echo $env:CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | ConvertFrom-Json).file_path; if ($fp -match '\.(toc|pkgmeta)$') { Write-Error 'WARNING: Modifying packaging file - verify changes carefully' }"
